channel.title: HUMOR
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in HUMOR

item.title: Satire, honey and tears: how The Onion and The Babylon Bee do satire
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0053

item.title: Category-activity puzzles as resources for humor in L2 classrooms
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0079

item.title: Men’s responses to being confronted for sexism with and without humor
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0032

item.title: Group boundaries in humor in the online public sphere
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0064

item.title: “That’d be another crisis nearly avoided”: humor and conflict management in hospital handover meetings
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0073

item.title: Humor styles moderate the association between health difficulties and quality of life in individuals diagnosed with a chronic disease
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0017

item.title: Aaron Sachs: Stay cool: why dark comedy matters in the fight against climate change
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2023-0072

item.title: Conal Condren: Between laughter and satire: aspects of the historical study of humour
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2023-0098

item.title: Patrick Giamario: Laughter as politics: critical theory in an age of hilarity
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2022-0097

item.title: Loukia Kostopoulou and Vasiliki Misiou: Transmedial perspectives on humor and translation: from page to screen to stage
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0050

item.title: Elliott Oring: The consolations of humor and other folklore essays
item.description: Article by Władysław Chłopicki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humor-2024-0046
